case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. THOMAS LIND

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-16-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037963), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A. SERVED SEP-11-2018, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE AUG-30-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT LIND, THOMAS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO  BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIND, THOMAS $9,796.87 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,946.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
